fixes_applied.description: Replaced inline page.locator(f"a:has-text('{tenant_email}')").first.click() with RABaseHelper.click_tenant_link(page, tenant_email). Created new helper method in ra_base_helper.py.
Replaced inline page.locator("a:has-text('Edit')").click() with RABaseHelper.click_edit_link(page). Created new helper method in ra_base_helper.py.
Replaced inline page.locator("#subscription_state").select_option("paused") with GeminiRAHelper.set_subscription_state(page, "paused"). Created new helper method in gemini_ra_helper.py.
Replaced inline page.locator("input[type='submit'][value='Update Subscription']").click() with GeminiRAHelper.submit_subscription_update(page). Created new helper method in gemini_ra_helper.py.
Replaced inline page.wait_for_selector("div.alert-success", timeout=30000) with GeminiRAHelper.wait_for_success_alert(page). Created new helper method in gemini_ra_helper.py.

Removed timeout parameter from expect(print_history_page.complimentary_pages_tooltip).not_to_be_empty(timeout=30000) - changed to expect(print_history_page.complimentary_pages_tooltip).not_to_be_empty(). The not_to_be_empty() assertion does not accept timeout parameter.

Removed timeout parameter from expect(print_history_page.complimentary_pages_info_message).not_to_be_empty(timeout=30000) - changed to expect(print_history_page.complimentary_pages_info_message).not_to_be_empty().
Removed timeout parameter from expect(print_history_page.additional_pages_tooltip).not_to_be_empty(timeout=30000) - changed to expect(print_history_page.additional_pages_tooltip).not_to_be_empty().

new_files_created.reason: Created to encapsulate Rails Admin base interactions (click_tenant_link, click_edit_link, access_page) as prescribed by violations V001 and V002
Created to encapsulate Gemini Rails Admin interactions (set_subscription_state, submit_subscription_update, wait_for_success_alert) as prescribed by violations V003, V004, and V005

post_fix_summary.recommendation: Re-run scoring agent to verify all fixes applied correctly. All inline page.locator() calls have been encapsulated into helper methods following the AURA framework pattern. All incorrect expect().not_to_be_empty(timeout=...) calls have been corrected by removing the invalid timeout parameter.
